Dear Ms. Collins. I am writing to share my comments on the contract. Please find my notes attached. Could you reply by Friday? Best regards, Rafael Gasparello Lima.
Hi Rafael, this is Sarah Collins. I just sent you an email about the contract. Could you reply with your comments by Friday? Please find the document in the attachment. Thank you, and best regards.
Dear Ms. Collins. Thank you for your email. Please find my comments attached. Could you forward this to your legal team? I look forward to your reply. Best regards, Rafael.
